description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image (e.g., ubuntu) and defines the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY set to recursive. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update -qy, installs build-essential, python-dev python-pip, installs cmake via pip, and installs clang, libsdl2-ttf-dev, and libdevil-dev. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that executes: mkdir build && cd build, cmake .., and cmake --build . The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
